title: Add Your Team and Brokerage Info
description: Set up your brokerage and add team members so every document, email, and milestone reflects who you really are.
voiceover_script: Hi, I'm Dossie. Setting up your team takes a minute and saves you forever. In Settings, add your brokerage name, your broker's contact, and any team members you want copied on emails I draft. From now on, every contract, every milestone card, and every compliance package goes out under your real brand. No more typos in your broker's email at midnight.
